mapper.sql: inventory_type_code, description, delflag, match_customer_no, match_project_code, mathch_ppl, match_group_customer_no, match_group_customer_type, creator, cre_time, modifier, modify_time, mathch_qb_no
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inventory_type
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_inventory_type (inventory_type_code, description, delflag, match_customer_no, match_project_code, mathch_ppl, match_group_customer_no, match_group_customer_type, creator, cre_time, modifier, modify_time, mathch_qb_no) values (#{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{matchCustomerNo,jdbcType=BIT}, #{matchProjectCode,jdbcType=BIT}, #{mathchPpl,jdbcType=BIT}, #{matchGroupCustomerNo,jdbcType=BIT}, #{matchGroupCustomerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{mathchQbNo,jdbcType=BIT})

insert into dbo.ops_inventory_type
inventory_type_code,
description,
delflag,
match_customer_no,
match_project_code,
mathch_ppl,
match_group_customer_no,
match_group_customer_type,
creator,
cre_time,
modifier,
modify_time,
mathch_qb_no,
#{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{matchCustomerNo,jdbcType=BIT},
#{matchProjectCode,jdbcType=BIT},
#{mathchPpl,jdbcType=BIT},
#{matchGroupCustomerNo,jdbcType=BIT},
#{matchGroupCustomerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{mathchQbNo,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_inventory_type
inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{record.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
match_customer_no = #{record.matchCustomerNo,jdbcType=BIT},
match_project_code = #{record.matchProjectCode,jdbcType=BIT},
mathch_ppl = #{record.mathchPpl,jdbcType=BIT},
match_group_customer_no = #{record.matchGroupCustomerNo,jdbcType=BIT},
match_group_customer_type = #{record.matchGroupCustomerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mathch_qb_no = #{record.mathchQbNo,jdbcType=BIT},

update dbo.ops_inventory_type set inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{record.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, match_customer_no = #{record.matchCustomerNo,jdbcType=BIT}, match_project_code = #{record.matchProjectCode,jdbcType=BIT}, mathch_ppl = #{record.mathchPpl,jdbcType=BIT}, match_group_customer_no = #{record.matchGroupCustomerNo,jdbcType=BIT}, match_group_customer_type = #{record.matchGroupCustomerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, mathch_qb_no = #{record.mathchQbNo,jdbcType=BIT}

update dbo.ops_inventory_type
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
match_customer_no = #{matchCustomerNo,jdbcType=BIT},
match_project_code = #{matchProjectCode,jdbcType=BIT},
mathch_ppl = #{mathchPpl,jdbcType=BIT},
match_group_customer_no = #{matchGroupCustomerNo,jdbcType=BIT},
match_group_customer_type = #{matchGroupCustomerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mathch_qb_no = #{mathchQbNo,jdbcType=BIT},
where inventory_type_code = #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_inventory_type set description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, match_customer_no = #{matchCustomerNo,jdbcType=BIT}, match_project_code = #{matchProjectCode,jdbcType=BIT}, mathch_ppl = #{mathchPpl,jdbcType=BIT}, match_group_customer_no = #{matchGroupCustomerNo,jdbcType=BIT}, match_group_customer_type = #{matchGroupCustomerType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, mathch_qb_no = #{mathchQbNo,jdbcType=BIT} where inventory_type_code = #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
